matched.name: Fynn
matched.description: Fynn is a cafe chair designed for waiting areas and relaxed office spaces.

overview_sections.heading: Casual Sophistication
overview_sections.body: The Fynn High Café Chair blends natural warmth with clean, modern precision through its solid wood base and upholstered seat. Its balanced proportions and supportive backrest make it a comfortable choice for cafés, collaborative zones, and social spaces.

Available in a variety of finishes, the Fynn High Café Chair offers versatility that suits both contemporary and classic interiors. Its durable construction ensures lasting comfort, while the elevated seat height adds a sophisticated presence. With timeless appeal and everyday functionality, Fynn is built to enhance any setting.
The plush, fully upholstered backrest offers gentle, wraparound support for extended comfort, while its smooth contours and textured fabric add visual warmth.

The robust legs provide lasting durability and a warm, timeless look. Their wide, angled stance and reinforced crossbars ensure superior stability and strength, making the stool secure and comfortable for both café and home use.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Grace
matched.description: Grace is a leather chair designed for modern executive spaces.

overview_sections.heading: Executive Comfort, Sculpted in Leather
overview_sections.body: Crafted with premium leather upholstery, this ergonomic chair delivers a refined balance of luxury and comfort. Its smooth, contoured surfaces offer a plush seating experience while elevating the visual language of modern executive spaces.

Designed to support natural posture, the chair features precision ergonomics that adapt to your body’s movement. From long strategy sessions to focused work hours, it ensures sustained comfort, stability, and effortless mobility.
Precision die-cast armrests deliver superior strength and stability, offering consistent support with a refined metallic finish that elevates the chair’s executive appeal.
The elegantly contoured backrest is designed to follow the natural curve of the spine, promoting healthy posture while adding a sleek, modern silhouette.
Upholstered in premium leather, the seat provides a plush, breathable feel that ensures lasting comfort and a luxurious seating experience throughout long work hours.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Leaf
matched.description: Leaf is a cafe chair designed for teamwork and shared workspaces.

overview_sections.heading: Stack Up in Style
overview_sections.body: The Leaf Café Chair features a distinctive wing shaped silhouette that adds a refined and stylish touch to any setting. Its graceful, sculpted form brings a sense of sophistication while blending effortlessly into cafés, dining rooms, lounges, and workspaces. Designed to elevate interiors, it offers both visual appeal and everyday practicality.

Crafted with comfort in mind, the leaf Café Chair provides supportive seating ideal for extended use in both home and commercial environments. Its thoughtfully shaped backrest enhances posture while maintaining a light, contemporary feel. Versatile and functional, it adds character and comfort to any space it occupies.

The perforated backrest allows refreshing airflow for cool comfort, while its gentle curve offers natural ergonomic support. Lightweight yet durable, the design flexes with the body, delivering a modern look with enhanced ease and comfort.

The smooth, perforated seat provides breathable comfort with a contoured shape that supports natural posture while keeping the design lightweight. Paired with sturdy molded legs for reliable stability and durability, the chair is well-suited for cafés, dining areas, and everyday spaces.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Lexus
matched.description: Lexus is a cafe chair designed for premium comfort and durability.

overview_sections.heading: Crafted to Last
overview_sections.body: The Lexus Café Chair brings together timeless design and contemporary appeal with its refined, wing inspired silhouette. Its smooth, sculpted form adds character to cafés, dining areas, and social spaces. Blending tradition with modern aesthetics, it stands out as both elegant and versatile.

Lightweight yet reliably sturdy, the Lexus Café Chair is crafted for everyday comfort and durability. Its supportive structure ensures ease during long seating periods, making it ideal for both home and commercial settings. Designed for lasting use, it delivers style, comfort, and practicality in every space.

The seat’s woven cane-style pattern brings natural texture and airflow for cool comfort, while its molded build ensures durability with gentle flexibility. Lightweight yet supportive, it blends traditional craftsmanship with modern ease.

The molded cane-style backrest enhances airflow and adds a warm, natural texture, while its gentle curve offers supportive comfort for longer sitting. Lightweight yet durable, it combines traditional charm with modern structural strength.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Lisbo
matched.description: Lisbo is a cafe chair designed for relaxed office spaces and modern interiors.

overview_sections.body: Built with ergonomic support in mind, the Lisbo High Café Chair offers a comfortable seating experience ideal for long durations. Its supportive structure makes it perfect for high counters, workspaces, and social settings.
The smooth, gently curved backrest supports the upper body while offering relaxed, ergonomic seating. Its seamless moulded design is minimal and elegant, adding a refined modern touch to any space.

The strong, finished legs offer lasting durability and a warm, refined look. Their angled stance with an integrated metal footrest ensures stability and comfort, combining strength, style, and elegance.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Logica
matched.description: Logica is a mesh chair designed for modern offices.

features: Smart design. Effortless support. Comfort that fits the way you work
specs.dimensions: Armrest height (from floor): 670 mm; Armrest width: 250 mm.; Armrest width: 85 mm.; Overall height: 1000 mm; Seat headrest width : 515 mm; Overall width (base including wheels): 700 mm; Seat width: 500 mm.

overview_sections.heading: Smart design. Effortless support. Comfort that fits the way you work
overview_sections.body: Logica is built with simplicity and intelligence at its core. With user-friendly features and essential support, it brings balance to your setup—helping you stay comfortable and aligned through your entire workday
With thoughtful ergonomic features, Logica helps relieve pressure across your back and shoulders—allowing you to stay focused, not fatigued.

matched.name: Moonlight
matched.description: Moonlight is a leather chair designed for comfort and modern interiors.

features: Sculpted Comfort with a Modern Edge

overview_sections.heading: Sculpted Comfort with a Modern Edge
overview_sections.body: Defined by clean lines and a softly contoured form, this premium leather chair brings understated sophistication to contemporary offices. The seamless upholstery and refined proportions create a calm, confident visual presence

Thoughtfully engineered ergonomics provide balanced support to the back and seat, adapting naturally to extended sitting. The result is a composed, comfortable seating experience that keeps you focused, poised, and in control throughout the day.
The intelligently engineered recline mechanism allows fluid back movement, adapting naturally to posture changes for relaxed comfort during extended sitting.
Soft premium leather upholstery with generous padding delivers superior seating comfort, combining visual elegance with a plush, supportive feel throughout the day.

matched.name: Myel
matched.description: Myel is a mesh chair designed for daily comfort and productivity. The chair includes dedicated head and neck support for longer work sessions.

specs.dimensions: Overall width: 635 ±10 mm; Backrest width (atinner frame): 460 ±10 mm; Armrest heightadjustment: 200–255 ±10 mm; Seat heightadjustment: 435–505 ±10 mm; Backrest width: 490 ±10 mm; Headrest width: 270 ±10 mm; Headrest height adjustment: 170–220 ±10 mm; Base width: 500 ±10 mm; Caster wheel clearance: 45 ±5 mm; Overall depth: 580 ±10 mm; Seat depth adjustment: 465–525 ±10 mm; Backrest height (without headrest): 1010–1080 ±10 mm; Overall height (with headrest): 1165–1235 ±10 mm; Base height (minimum): 640 ±10 mm

overview_sections.heading: Managing your everyday life
overview_sections.body: Myel Excellence represents the perfect fusion of unparalleled comfort and superior craftsmanship. Each chair is meticulously designed to provide the ultimate seating experience, blending luxurious support with timeless style.
The chair features an adjustable headrest, offering support for your neck, promoting relaxation during long sitting sessions.
Equipped with 3D adjustable armrests, the Myel chair allows for customizable positioning, ensuring optimal support and reducing strain on your arms and shoulders.
With adjustable lumbar support, the Myel chair helps maintain proper posture, providing targeted lower back support for enhanced comfort throughout the day

matched.name: Nordic
matched.description: Nordic is a cafe chair built for commercial interiors.

specs.dimensions: Height: 756mm.; Width: 570 mm.; Height of Seat: 465 mm.

overview_sections.heading: Wooded Elegance
overview_sections.body: The Nordic Cafe Chair features clean lines and a beautifully sculpted form that showcases timeless wooden craftsmanship. Its angular silhouette paired with an open-frame backrest creates a perfect balance of strength and lightness.

Enhanced with a soft upholstered seat, it provides exceptional comfort while adding a tactile touch. Thoughtfully designed, it blends effortlessly into both contemporary interiors and classic spaces with understated elegance.

Engineered with a sleek, open-frame backrest that offers natural support while maintaining a light visual profile. Its fluid wooden contour enhances posture and adds a refined, modern character to any setting.

The cushioned seat offers soft, supportive comfort with a refined textile touch. Its durable upholstery and precise wooden detailing ensure both long-lasting ease and elevated aesthetics in every sit.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Nuvic
matched.description: Nuvic is a mesh chair designed for comfort and posture support. Integrated lumbar support helps maintain a steadier seated posture.

features: Engineered for active posture. Support that moves as you do
specs.dimensions: Seat height till armrest: 300 mm.; Armrest length: 250 mm.; Seat height till ground: 450 mm.; Overall height: 1080 mm; Seat headrest width : 400 mm; Overall width (base including wheels): 660 mm

overview_sections.heading: Engineered for active posture. Support that moves as you do
overview_sections.body: Nuvic is made for motion—combining responsive ergonomics with a clean, modern build. It encourages better posture, smoother transitions, and focused work with comfort that stays consistent from task to task.
With flexible structure and personalized adjustment, Nuvic supports key pressure zones and helps you maintain balance through hours of deep work
Move the armrests vertically to match your natural arm position, reducing fatigue and enhancing ergonomic alignment
Built-in lumbar shaping offers steady lower back support, promoting an upright position and reducing strain throughout the day

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
